title: achillea maritima
intro: Achillea maritima, also known as sea or wild chamomile, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal and health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and alleviating digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Achillea maritima can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are then used to promote relaxation, soothe sore muscles, and calm the mind. Herbal preparations of Achillea maritima have also been known to ease menstrual cramps, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system, making it a valuable plant in natural medicine.
